speaker: GOWER
text: Imagine Pericles arrived at Tyre,

speaker: GOWER
text: Welcomed and settled to his own desire.

speaker: GOWER
text: His woeful queen we leave at Ephesus,

speaker: GOWER
text: Unto Diana there ’s a votaress.

speaker: GOWER
text: Now to Marina bend your mind,

speaker: GOWER
text: Whom our fast-growing scene must find

speaker: GOWER
text: At Tarsus, and by Cleon trained

speaker: GOWER
text: In music, letters; who hath gained

speaker: GOWER
text: Of education all the grace

speaker: GOWER
text: Which makes high both the art and place

speaker: GOWER
text: Of general wonder. But, alack,

speaker: GOWER
text: That monster envy, oft the wrack

speaker: GOWER
text: Of earnèd praise, Marina’s life

speaker: GOWER
text: Seeks to take off by treason’s knife.

speaker: GOWER
text: And in this kind our Cleon hath

speaker: GOWER
text: One daughter and a full grown wench,

speaker: GOWER
text: Even ripe for marriage rite. This maid

speaker: GOWER
text: Hight Philoten, and it is said

speaker: GOWER
text: For certain in our story she

speaker: GOWER
text: Would ever with Marina be.

speaker: GOWER
text: Be ’t when they weaved the sleided silk

speaker: GOWER
text: With fingers long, small, white as milk;

speaker: GOWER
text: Or when she would with sharp needle wound

speaker: GOWER
text: The cambric, which she made more sound

speaker: GOWER
text: By hurting it; or when to the lute

speaker: GOWER
text: She sung, and made the night bird mute,

speaker: GOWER
text: That still records with moan; or when

speaker: GOWER
text: She would with rich and constant pen

speaker: GOWER
text: Vail to her mistress Dian, still

speaker: GOWER
text: This Philoten contends in skill

speaker: GOWER
text: With absolute Marina. So

speaker: GOWER
text: With the dove of Paphos might the crow

speaker: GOWER
text: Vie feathers white. Marina gets

speaker: GOWER
text: All praises, which are paid as debts

speaker: GOWER
text: And not as given. This so darks

speaker: GOWER
text: In Philoten all graceful marks

speaker: GOWER
text: That Cleon’s wife, with envy rare,

speaker: GOWER
text: A present murderer does prepare

speaker: GOWER
text: For good Marina, that her daughter

speaker: GOWER
text: Might stand peerless by this slaughter.

speaker: GOWER
text: The sooner her vile thoughts to stead,

speaker: GOWER
text: Lychorida, our nurse, is dead,

speaker: GOWER
text: And cursèd Dionyza hath

speaker: GOWER
text: The pregnant instrument of wrath

speaker: GOWER
text: Prest for this blow. The unborn event

speaker: GOWER
text: I do commend to your content.

speaker: GOWER
text: Only I carry wingèd Time

speaker: GOWER
text: Post on the lame feet of my rhyme,

speaker: GOWER
text: Which never could I so convey

speaker: GOWER
text: Unless your thoughts went on my way.

speaker: GOWER
text: Dionyza does appear,

speaker: GOWER
text: With Leonine, a murderer.
